calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-23-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-21-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record of a Labor Commissioner's Order, Decision or Award.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Robert Jones, Esq. for for Respondent: Kimberly Epling, also present.
Appeallant: Carmen Barros, ind. dba. Key Moda, dba. Dance In Paris, present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant shall pay to Plaintiff the settlement sum of $2,250.00 by C/C, to be mailed to Counsel within 30 days, Dismissal with prejudice upon receipt of the payment.
Each to bear own fees and parties mutually release each other from all claims.
Parties understand and agreed to terms.
Matter is deemed settled, trial vacated, and placed on the CRC-225 Calendar in Dept. 212 for Dimissal on March 21, 2006 at 10:00 A.M.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2005 Continued To Jan-23-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
